draft_picks.reasoning: Hawks L10: 9-1 is the strongest recent form signal on tonight's entire slate — priority stat #1. Bucks are L10: 3-7 with a 3-game losing streak, meeting two of three tank-watch criteria. Hawks are home with play-in/playoff motivation. NetRtg trend clearly favors Hawks. Bucks fading hard with no clear turnaround signal. Estimated odds ~1.80 fall within 1.70–2.50 target range. No franchise player injuries flagged for Hawks. High-confidence pick pending odds confirmation at commit.

Both teams share L10: 8-2 records, but Heat have home court advantage at Kaseya Center. Both are in playoff/play-in contention providing high motivation. Home advantage in a mirror-image matchup is the tiebreaker. Heat culture known for home performance. No franchise player injuries flagged. Estimated odds ~1.88 within target range. Confidence capped at Medium given how evenly matched these teams are — Magic equally capable of winning. Stake set at 15% (medium tier).

Kings are a confirmed tanking team (16-51, L10: 4-6, worst record in West, own 2026 pick) — skills state betting AGAINST tanking teams is edge-positive. Clippers are home (L10: 7-3) with strong play-in motivation. Motivation delta is massive: Clippers fighting for postseason, Kings actively tanking. No franchise player injuries flagged for Clippers. CONDITIONAL PICK: Odds must confirm ≥ 1.70 at commit phase — if Clippers are shorter than 1.70, this pick should be withdrawn. At estimated ~1.72, just inside our range.
